title: Animal Crossing: Wild World Songpack
description: A Reactive Music Mod songpack that dynamically uses Animal Crossing OSTs in-game. The mod, Reactive Music, is required for the resource pack to work.
body:
This resource pack uses the Animal Crossing Wild World OST with dynamically changing music based on time of day, weather, and dimension.

**The mod, [Reactive Music](https://modrinth.com/mod/reactive-music), is required for this pack to work.**

**Installation**
1. drag-and-drop the downloaded songpack.zip into your **resourcepacks** folder
2. In-game, navigate to your Reactive Music Mod settings and enable the pack.
